sql.trim: t1.CREATED_BY, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.PUNISH, t1.FK_SUB_COL_ID, t1.PUNISH_CONTENT, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.REWARD, t1.INTEGRAL_DATE, t1.PERSONAL, t1.FOUNDATIONS_CONTENT, t1.PERSONAL_CONTENT, t1.VERSION, t1.REWARD_CONTENT, t1.ID, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.FOUNDATIONS, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.INTEGRAL_CONTENT, t1.DATA_1, t1.USER_ID, t1.SEX, t1.PARTY_ID, t1.PARTY_NAME, t1.ID_NUMBER,

mapper.select:
select
from INTEGRAL t1
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc
mapper.insert:
insert into INTEGRAL
CREATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
PUNISH,
FK_SUB_COL_ID,
PUNISH_CONTENT,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
REWARD,
INTEGRAL_DATE,
PERSONAL,
FOUNDATIONS_CONTENT,
PERSONAL_CONTENT,
VERSION,
REWARD_CONTENT,
ID,
CREATED_DEPT,
ORG_IDENTITY,
FOUNDATIONS,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
INTEGRAL_CONTENT,
DATA_1,
USER_ID,
SEX,
PARTY_ID,
PARTY_NAME,
ID_NUMBER,
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{punish,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{fkSubColId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{punishContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{reward,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{integralDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{personal,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{foundationsContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{personalContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{rewardContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{foundations,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{integralContent,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{data1,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{idNumber,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into INTEGRAL( CREATED_BY , LAST_UPDATED_BY , PUNISH , FK_SUB_COL_ID , PUNISH_CONTENT , CREATION_DATE , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , REWARD , INTEGRAL_DATE , PERSONAL , FOUNDATIONS_CONTENT , PERSONAL_CONTENT , VERSION , REWARD_CONTENT , ID , CREATED_DEPT , ORG_IDENTITY , FOUNDATIONS , LAST_UPDATE_IP , INTEGRAL_CONTENT , DATA_1 , USER_ID , SEX , PARTY_ID , PARTY_NAME , ID_NUMBER )
select #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.punish,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.fkSubColId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.punishContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.reward,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.integralDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.personal,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.foundationsContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.personalContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.rewardContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.foundations,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.integralContent,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.data1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.idNumber,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update INTEGRAL
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PUNISH = #{punish,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
FK_SUB_COL_ID = #{fkSubColId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PUNISH_CONTENT = #{punishContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
REWARD = #{reward,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
INTEGRAL_DATE = #{integralDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
PERSONAL = #{personal,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
FOUNDATIONS_CONTENT = #{foundationsContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PERSONAL_CONTENT = #{personalContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
VERSION = version+1,
REWARD_CONTENT = #{rewardContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
FOUNDATIONS = #{foundations,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
INTEGRAL_CONTENT = #{integralContent,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
DATA_1 = #{data1,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SEX = #{sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_ID = #{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_NAME = #{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ID_NUMBER = #{idNumber,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update INTEGRAL set CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PUNISH = #{punish,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , FK_SUB_COL_ID = #{fkSubColId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PUNISH_CONTENT = #{punishContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , REWARD = #{reward,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , INTEGRAL_DATE = #{integralDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , PERSONAL = #{personal,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , FOUNDATIONS_CONTENT = #{foundationsContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PERSONAL_CONTENT = #{personalContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , REWARD_CONTENT = #{rewardContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FOUNDATIONS = #{foundations,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , INTEGRAL_CONTENT = #{integralContent,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , DATA_1 = #{data1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SEX = #{sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_ID = #{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_NAME = #{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID_NUMBER = #{idNumber,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update INTEGRAL set CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PUNISH = #{item.punish,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , FK_SUB_COL_ID = #{item.fkSubColId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PUNISH_CONTENT = #{item.punishContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , REWARD = #{item.reward,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , INTEGRAL_DATE = #{item.integralDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , PERSONAL = #{item.personal,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , FOUNDATIONS_CONTENT = #{item.foundationsContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PERSONAL_CONTENT = #{item.personalContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , REWARD_CONTENT = #{item.rewardContent,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FOUNDATIONS = #{item.foundations,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , INTEGRAL_CONTENT = #{item.integralContent,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , DATA_1 = #{item.data1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_ID = #{item.userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SEX = #{item.sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_ID = #{item.partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_NAME = #{item.partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID_NUMBER = #{item.idNumber,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}

mapper.select: select * from INTEGRAL t1 left join DYN_POINTS t2 ON t1.FK_SUB_COL_ID = t2.id where t1.USER_ID = #{id} and t2.QUARTER = #{quary} and to_char(t1.INTEGRAL_DATE,'yyyy') = to_char((select TRUNC(TRUNC(sysdate,'YYYY')-1,'yyyy') from dual),'yyyy')
